canvasEmptySelectionHint: Select a node to edit it, or add one from the palette. Wire a source into a condition, and the condition's signal into an action.
canvasErrorInvalidJson: The rule definition is not valid JSON.
canvasErrorNotRuleObject: The rule definition is not a rule object.
canvasErrorUnsupportedType: This rule type ({{type}}) cannot be shown on the canvas.
canvasFixCompileErrors: Fix the compile errors before previewing
canvasScopedToGroup: Scoped to group <mono>{{token}}@{{version}}</mono> — preserved on save; edit the scope in the Form tab.
canvasTokenDescription: The rule id; it cannot change.
defCommandDescription: The commands a device accepts, with their optional parameter schema.
defCommandKeyHint: The command a device accepts, e.g. set_point.
defDetectionRuleDescription: Rules that raise alarms and send commands off this profile's telemetry. Author them step by step in the Form, or visually on the Canvas — both compile to the same rule.
defDetectionRuleEmptyHint: Use “New detection rule” to add one.
defMetricDescription: The typed, unit-bearing measurements a device reports.
defMetricKeyHint: The key measurements carry, e.g. temperature.
defParamSchemaHint: Optional JSON array of parameters, each { "name", "dataType", … }. Leave blank for a no-argument command.
healthEmpty: No published detection rules. Author rules in the Detection Rules tab and publish the profile.
healthFeedEmpty: Waiting for detections… firings appear here as rules trigger.
healthIntro: Per-rule health for this profile's active published version. A rule fires against live telemetry only after the profile is published.
inspectorAlarmKeyDescription: Repeated firings escalate one alarm keyed on this. Empty ⇒ the rule's token.
inspectorAnchorTypeDescription: The area/anchor devices roll up to (e.g. zone).
inspectorBodyCelDescription: A CEL expression over the detection (value / hasValue / series) evaluating to the request body string. Empty ⇒ no body.
inspectorBranchHelp: Use decimal literals (<gt100>value > 100.0</gt100>, not <oneHundred>100</oneHundred>). <valueWord>value</valueWord> is the triggering reading — it is absent for conditions that carry no scalar (absence, duration, and metric-less or raw-CEL leaves), so guard those with <hasValueWord>hasValue</hasValueWord> (e.g. <hasValueExpr>hasValue && value > 100.0</hasValueExpr>). The branch never blocks an alarm from clearing.
inspectorBranchLabelDescription: An optional name for this route (authoring only).
inspectorCelExpressionDescription: An advanced predicate over the event vocabulary. Cost-gated at compile.
inspectorComputeHelp: Wire this into a condition's or branch's <valuePort>value</valuePort> port, then reference it by name in that node's CEL (e.g. <tempFExample>tempF > 100.0</tempFExample>). It reads the vocabulary of whatever it feeds — the event's <mWord>m</mWord>/<attrWord>attr</attrWord> for a condition leaf, the detection's <valueWord>value</valueWord>/<hasValueWord>hasValue</hasValueWord>/<seriesWord>series</seriesWord> for a branch. Use decimal literals; a computed value can only feed a <celWord>CEL</celWord> predicate, not a structured metric·op·threshold leaf.
inspectorComputeNameDescription: The identifier the condition or branch references this value by. Letters, digits, underscore; not starting with a digit.
inspectorComputeValueCelDescription: A single expression the compiler folds into the predicate it feeds. Cost-gated at compile.
inspectorConnectorDescription: The registered connector to publish through. Manage connectors under Connectors.
inspectorHeadersDescription: Optional static headers, one “Key: Value” per line. Authorization / X-DC-* are reserved and rejected at publish.
inspectorNoConnectorsHint: No connectors yet. Create one under <link>Connectors</link>, then pick it here.
inspectorOnlyWhenCelDescription: A boolean over the detection: value, hasValue, series. Downstream actions run only when it holds. Cost-gated at compile.
inspectorPayloadCelDescription: A CEL expression over the detection evaluating to the message body string. Empty ⇒ an empty payload.
inspectorSecretHandleDescription: Optional. The name of a stored secret presented as the auth header at dispatch. Never the cleartext value.
inspectorSeverityDescription: Required when this rule raises an alarm.
inspectorSourceScopedTo: Scoped to profile <mono>{{token}}</mono>. Every rule reads this profile's telemetry.
inspectorUrlDescription: An http/https endpoint. POST only. Delivered by the outbound-connectors service.
nlDraftFailedMessage_one: The draft didn’t compile after {{count}} attempt. Refine your description and try again.
nlDraftFailedMessage_other: The draft didn’t compile after {{count}} attempts. Refine your description and try again.
nlFooterNote: The AI proposes; the compiler decides. Nothing is saved until you do.
nlHelpText: Describe the rule in plain language. AI drafts it and the compiler checks it; you review and save the result through the form.
nlNoDefinitionError: The draft compiled but returned no definition. Please try again.
nlPlaceholder: e.g. Raise a major alarm when the case temperature stays above 80°C for 5 minutes
nlUnavailableDefaultReason: Natural-language drafting is not available — no inference provider is enabled for this tenant.
previewDescription: Replays this profile's published history and shows the raise/resolve edges this draft would have produced — nothing is published.
previewSelectFiringHint: Select a firing to trace its path on the canvas.
profileCategoryHint: Functional device class, e.g. thermostat, meter, gateway. Suggests categories already in use; you can type a new one.
profileTokenLockedHint: The profile id; it cannot change.
ruleActionGuardNote: Runs only when <mono>{{guard}}</mono> — a branch condition authored on the Canvas. It is preserved here; switch to the Canvas to change or remove it.
ruleActionsForbiddenNote: An area-correlation rule cannot carry actions — its series is an area anchor, not a device.
ruleActionsSectionDescription: What happens when the rule fires. No action ⇒ it emits a subscribe-able signal only.
ruleAlarmKeyDescription: Optional. Repeated firings escalate one alarm keyed here; blank ⇒ the rule's token.
ruleAnchorTypeDescription: The anchor (area) relationship distinct devices roll up to.
ruleBoundDescription: A fixed value, or the device's own attribute.
ruleCelDescription: An advanced predicate over the event vocabulary (m, attr, device). Type-checked and cost-gated at publish.
ruleCommandDescription: The command key on this profile.
ruleConditionDescriptionOptional: An optional per-event gate. “Match every event” lets the temporal shape carry the logic.
ruleConditionDescriptionRequired: The comparison this rule fires on.
ruleCountDescriptionAggregate: The number of events per count window.
ruleCountDescriptionCorrelation: The number of distinct devices that must report within the window.
ruleCountDescriptionRepeating: The number of matching events within the window.
ruleDescriptionPlaceholder: What this rule detects and why.
ruleEnabledCheckboxLabel: Enabled — a disabled rule is kept with the profile but not run.
ruleHintAggCount: A count-window aggregate needs a positive count.
ruleHintAggGap: A session aggregate needs a gap.
ruleHintAggMetric: This aggregate needs a value metric.
ruleHintAggThreshold: The aggregate needs a numeric threshold.
ruleHintConditionRequired: This rule type requires a condition.
ruleHintConditionThreshold: The condition needs a numeric threshold value.
ruleHintConditionThresholdAttr: The condition needs a threshold attribute.
ruleHintCorrCount: Correlation needs a positive distinct-device count.
ruleHintRaiseAlarmSeverity: A raise-alarm action requires a severity.
ruleHintRepeatingCount: Repeating needs a positive occurrence count.
ruleHintSendCommandNeedsCommand: A send-command action needs a command.
ruleMemberCapDescription: Optional retained-member backstop; defaults to the platform limit.
ruleMetricDescription: The metric key the event carries.
ruleNameDescription: A human name for the rule.
ruleOutboundActionNote: An outbound {{kind}} action authored on the Canvas. It is preserved here; switch to the Canvas to change it, or Remove it.
rulePayloadDescription: Optional JSON object of arguments, stored verbatim.
ruleRateCheckboxLabel: Per-second rate (otherwise the raw delta between samples).
ruleScopeCheckboxLabel: Scope to an entity group — fire this rule only for members of a group version.
ruleScopeGroupDescription: A dynamic entity group. Members are resolved from the group version's frozen selector.
ruleScopeHalfSetHint: Pick a published version for the scoped group.
ruleScopeNoPublishedVersion: This group has no published version yet — publish the group before scoping a rule to it.
ruleScopeUnsupportedKind: A group scope is not supported on a {{ruleType}} rule — publishing will be refused. Absence and correlation rules cannot be group-scoped.
ruleScopeVersionDescription: The rule pins a specific published version, so its target set never drifts under a later group edit.
ruleScopeVersionsLoadError: Could not load this group's versions — check your connection and try again.
ruleSeverityDescriptionRequired: Required — the tier a raised alarm carries.
ruleThresholdAttrDescription: The device attribute whose numeric value is the bound, e.g. tempLimit.
ruleTypeAbsenceDescription: Fires when a device goes silent for a window.
ruleTypeAggregateDescription: Fires when an aggregate over a window crosses a bound.
ruleTypeCorrelationDescription: Fires when distinct devices report under one anchor.
ruleTypeDeltaRateDescription: Fires on the change between consecutive samples.
ruleTypeDurationDescription: Fires when a comparison stays true for a sustained time.
ruleTypeRepeatingDescription: Fires when N matching events fall inside a window.
ruleTypeThresholdDescription: Fires while a metric compares past a bound.
ruleUnparseableWarning: This rule's stored definition could not be read into the form. It has been reset to a blank threshold rule — saving will replace the original definition.
ruleValueMetricDescriptionAgg: The metric folded by the aggregate.
ruleValueMetricDescriptionDelta: The metric whose change is measured.
ruleWindowModeCountDescription: A window of N events, not time.
ruleWindowModeSessionDescription: Closes after a gap of silence.
ruleWindowModeSlidingDescription: Trailing time window, re-evaluated per event.
versionNotPublished: Not published yet — devices resolve nothing on this profile until you publish.
versionPublishDrawerDescription: Freeze the current draft into a new version and make it the version devices resolve.
versionPublishExplain: Publishing snapshots the current draft — all metrics, commands, and alarm rules — into a new version. Devices resolve the active version, so draft edits take effect only when published.
versionRollbackConfirm: Make version {{version}} the active version devices resolve? The draft is unchanged.
versionUsedByWarning: Used by {{count}} device types — publishing changes what all of them resolve.
